programmes.show_description: Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Music
In September 1071, the Prince of Wales began his Royal Navy career, following tradition. This film explores the college's role in shaping Britain's future naval officers and the heir to the throne.
Alex Dyke learns about another popular car from our past when he visits the National Motor Museum at Beaulieu.
Helen is not alone when she works the nightshift. George is suspected of having some form of mind-altering experience, while Joy admits to being involved in an unusual relationship.
George grapples with illness, Henry grapples with some dreadful news and Gus wrestles with dreams involving a rather nice set of manacles.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
The horse fair at Stow has been held annually since Medieval times. Jack Hargreaves visits and takes a particular interest in a Romany flat cart.
When Sherlock Holmes disappears, Dr. Watson and Inspector Lestrade begin a search that leads them to a small shop.
A zealous suffragette acquires a bomb shaped like a croquet ball, intending only to draw attention to her cause, but it is switched!
Sherlock Holmes races against time in order to find the location of a bomb that was planted somewhere in London by an extortionist.
Form 5C leaves school for adult life, facing new challenges but holding onto their tight bond as they navigate work and growing up, determined to keep their unique group spirit alive.
Eric and Sharon struggle as he gets into trouble and she starts to reconsider things. Amateur sleuth Frankie steps in on his first case, shaking up the groups situation.
The Fenn Street Gang get a new member - Bernard Hedges.
The binmen try to make some money on the side by putting items they have found in the rubbish up for sale in local auction rooms.
It is Courtesy Week at Thunderbird 3's depot and the binmen are out to improve their image.
The crew swap rounds with another dustcart team and end up in a snobbish district of town.
While Rudi labors on the surface, rain reacts with toxic waste, endangering all of Medusa. Rudi knows the cause, but will the Council heed a mans warning?
Prof. Evans visits Medusa to negotiate the hostages return but finds the President seemingly dead. Liz is blamed and sentenced to die on the surface.
On the run, Adam and Shem hide in an apartment but are reported. Adam is caught, while Rose abandoned by her fiancé rescues Shem. As they grow close, the police close in.
The team is assigned the difficult task of establishing why three Interpol agents have apparently killed themselves.
Harry hosts a themed night at Woodcote Park that goes badly wrong, leaving Ken to untangle the trouble that follows.
The Alphans are hijacked by a robot, a living machine with a brain.
A saintly, impressive figure claims to be God, the creator of mankind.
A geological survey below the Moon's surface reveals the existence of a metallic cabinet.
Divorcees Bill and Faith are planning to move in together but Faiths teenage children and Bills ex-wife Liza are making a complicated situation even worse.
Faiths attempts to encourage Bill to get to know the children better turn out to be about as subtle as a brick wall across a motorway and about as easy to avoid.
Bill and Faith plan to spend their first night of passion under Faiths roof.
Songs, sketches, stand-up, celebrity guests, and an all-out assault on the nation's funny-bone, starring cheeky Cockney Brian Conley.
Songs, sketches, stand-up, celebrity guests, and an all-out assault on the nation's funny-bone, starring cheeky Cockney Brian Conley.

Harry hosts a themed night at Woodcote Park that goes badly wrong, leaving Ken to untangle the trouble that follows.
A tramp finds himself unwittingly sucked into the world of film production. Guest starring Frances Barber and Michael Kitchen.
Two hitchhikers modeling at a creepy English manor become trapped by a witches coven devoted to ritual sex and sacrifice. Once rejected by British censors, Virgin Witch became a cult erotic horror!
Freddie Horne leaves his trendy fashion magazine for a moral reform publisher to appease his jealous fiancée, only to discover the crusading boss secretly runs a house full of glamour models!

Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop and cheesy tracks to make you feel good.
Richard Latto presents alternative anthems from a music community with attitude.
Holmes and Watson are called to a boy's school in Belgium. It seems that a young student has gotten into the habit of writing the names of faculty members on a nearby church with deadly consequences.
When a serial killer is sentenced to death, he issues a threat that he will kill Sherlock Holmes before he himself is executed.
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 11/13
Francis Coudrill presents a unique blend of animation and the European Western in this TV classic as Hank Rides Again. 12/13
Dennis thinks he knows who truly supports him but doubts creep in. Everything builds to a turning point when Maureen brings him along to a party.
Penny decides shes not staying at home, but has to hide her new job from Bernard, whose views are very traditional. When he finally finds work, it unexpectedly puts him around all kinds of people.
Bloody Delilah decides to take a fortnights holiday to go salmon fishing in Scotland.
It's a boring day for the crew of Thunderbird 3, so when they are invited to take part in a Civil Defence exercise, they leap at the chance
Alex Dyke presents an hour of bubblegum pop to make you feel good.
At Octavias request, Liz and Rudi explore the abandoned records section. While Rudi seeks escape, Liz uncovers something far darker, an ancient experiment to create artificial life.
With the hostage exchange agreed, the ships depart Earth and Medusa, but a deadly ancient enemy appears. Unarmed, they rely on Rudi to devise a plan to save them all.
The legendary game show hosted by Derek Hobson where dogs and their owners compete for money and prizes.
Craig Stirling is caught up in an endless nightmare - is he dreaming, or is it real?
Craig Stirling is caught up in an endless nightmare - is he dreaming, or is it real?
Ken is asked to track down a missing man, leading him into a case involving business interests and deception.
A grim fight for survival takes place on a planet of bizarre intelligent plants.
A battle for life with rock that pulsates with power, energy, intelligence and purpose.

Five months after Joanna leaves, McCallum is still not coping, leaving Angela overburdened with work. An accident outside of a senior living home leads to unusual findings
When a beautiful 28-year-old high school teacher seduces her star pupil, their careless and uncontrolled passion leads to murder and mayhem.
